libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: For native-image test execution on JDK 25, configure native test runtime system properties equivalent to: -Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow and -Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true. WebClient coverage can use an in-process Vert.x HttpServer on localhost; no external service or Docker image is required.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The existing 5.0.0 Gradle setup applies these native runtime args only when libraryVersion == '5.0.0'; a generated 5.0.1 test that inherits that condition may reproduce the native-image run failure.
Optional Vert.x modules such as vertx-auth-oauth2 are declared optional and are only needed for OAuth-specific scenarios, not for meaningful core WebClient coverage.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1 depends on Vert.x 5.0.1, which manages Netty 4.2.2.Final. Existing 5.0.0 tests already document that Netty 4.2.x needs explicit unsafe/reflection access for Java 25 native runs; 5.0.1 remains in that Netty line, so generated tests should preserve that runtime setup.
